speaker: speaker1
text: John , I ’ d like you to meet Charles Brown , our new manager at the airport .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , certainly . How can I recognize him ?

speaker: speaker1
text: He is short , well-built , and he ’ s got light blond hair .

speaker: speaker1
text: He has a mustache , if I remember correctly , and a light complexion .

speaker: speaker1
text: He is in his late thirties .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well . I shouldn ’ t have any trouble recognizing him . What time does his flight arrive ?
